//: Enemies and encounters. weaknesses/resists use combat-tuning elements. toughness = Break gauge: weakness hits chip it by the ability's breakPower; at 0 the enemy Breaks (loses its turn, takes bonus + amplified damage). Encounter 'modifiers' let story flags pre-weaken or scout enemies — see the mill confrontation dialogue.

enemies.name: Husk Sentinel
enemies.desc: What's left when the Hush finishes with a bell-keeper: tall, grey, hollow as a drum that will never be struck again. It guards the silence it died making.
enemies.loreNote: Husks keep the shape of their last duty. This one still listens for a bell.

enemies.name: Mute Wisp
enemies.desc: A scrap of swallowed sound given teeth — someone's last shout, still looking for a way out.
enemies.loreNote: Wisps scatter before moving air and burn like dry leaves.

encounters.name: The Roost in the Mill
encounters.intro: The millstones stand stopped mid-grind. Above them, folded into the rafters like a grey banner, the Husk Sentinel unfolds — and two scraps of stolen sound peel away from its shoulders.

modifiers.//: set by the confrontation dialogue: a resonant note or a successful ambush cracks its guard before the fight
set by hush lore learned at the hush-edge or from Old Tam
